info.name: Amar Bangla Authentication Api
info.description:
The **Amar Bangla Authentication API** provides secure login and registration endpoints for all user roles in the Amar Bangla platform.  
All authentication-related APIs are centralized here, ensuring consistent token-based access across different user types.

---

## Overview

- **Purpose:** Manage authentication for all Amar Bangla users (Super Admin, Shop Admin, Agent, Delivery Boy, Customer).
    
- **Authentication:** Endpoints issue **Bearer tokens** upon successful login. These tokens must be included in the `Authorization` header for protected requests.
    
- **Header Example:**
    

| Key | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Authorization | Bearer |

---

request.description:
## Purpose

Authenticate a **Shop Admin** user and return an access token for authorized requests.

## Purpose

Registers a new **Shop Admin** account and returns an access token to authenticate subsequent requests.

## Auth

This endpoint **requires Super Admin authentication**.  
Include a valid **Bearer token** obtained from the Super Admin login API in the `Authorization` header.
